title: The Kings Crown
description: this plugin adds a powerful crown but at a cost
body: this plugin adds the craft for an over powered Kings Crown that when worn gives perminant strength 2, speed 2, and fire resistance. The crown also has two abilities one is a dash ability that is activated by the player holding sneak and then right clicking and the second ability is a teleportation ability that is activeted by the player double sneaking this teleports the player to where they are looking
